seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Esmond and Essendon Fields. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Esmond vs Essendon Fields: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Esmond and Essendon Fields.
heading: Esmond vs Essendon Fields — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Esmond, Victoria and Essendon Fields, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Essendon Fields has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Esmond (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Esmond or Essendon Fields safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Esmond has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Essendon Fields scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Esmond scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Essendon Fields scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Esmond or Essendon Fields?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Essendon Fields has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
